arguments.title: Missing Receiver Phone – load-visible-001
arguments.description: Driver requested the receiver phone number for load FH-2026-001 (delivery stop: 456 Delivery St, Dock 4, Dallas, TX 75201). The receiver_phone field is null in the load data. Please locate and provide the number to the driver.

arguments.message: ⚠️ Missing Info – Load FH-2026-001: Driver requested the receiver phone number but it is not on file. A follow-up task has been created. Please source and relay the number ASAP.
We don't have the receiver phone number on file right now. Our team is looking into it and will send it to you as soon as we have it.
